programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn. Starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: New York City becomes the bullet-riddled playground of a former assassin (Keanu Reeves) as he hunts down the Russian mobsters who destroyed everything he held dear. Starring Keanu Reeves, Michael Nyqvist, Alfie Allen.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: When new surgical nurse Mia arrives at the hospital, she quickly turns her charm on married colleagues, Charlotte and Jacob, who cant help but feel unsettled when she unexpectedly moves into the house next door.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: After a wild night out, Charlotte tries to distance herself from Mia; Charlottes ex, Leo, returns to the hospital and at the fundraising ball, his and Jacobs mutual dislike is palpable; Mias reaction to a death at the hospital raises eyebrows.

programme.title: Passchendaele
programme.desc: Sgt. Dunne (Paul Gross) returns to war to look after a nurses brother. Starring Caroline Dhavernas, Gil Bellows, Paul Gross.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. His retirement is short-lived as he laces up the skates once again to try and reclaim his former glory. Starring Seann William Scott, Liev Schreiber, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Night Raiders
programme.desc: In a post-war future, a mother joins an underground band of vigilantes to try and rescue her daughter from a state-run institution. Starring Elle-Maija Tailfeathers, Brooklyn Letexier-Hart, Alex Tarrant.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team rescue passengers and crew from a sinking ship, taking them back to Sanctuary for medical treatment.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate travel to Mumbai to investigate a murder and the connection to the ancient cult of Kali, whose followers can foretell disaster.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: After losing a rigged sled race, Frankie challenges newcomer Zac to one last showdown. With the stakes higher than ever, Zac will stop at nothing to win the race. Starring Lucinda Davis, Noel Fisher, Angela Galuppo.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: A girl in Nazi-occupied France goes into hiding with help from a schoolmate -- a boy who risks everything to give her the chance to survive. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation. Starring Ariella Glaser, Orlando Schwerdt, Helen Mirren.

programme.title: Goose!
programme.desc: A boy (Max Morrow) conspires to save a talking gander from a man (Chevy Chase) who plans to cook the bird in an upcoming culinary contest. Starring Chevy Chase, Kari Matchett, Max Morrow.

programme.title: Manufactured Landscapes
programme.desc: The work of photographer Edward Burtynsky includes Chinas ongoing Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: A Canadian sculptor (Jeff Daniels) builds an ultralight plane so his teen daughter (Anna Paquin) can lead geese south. Starring Jeff Daniels, Anna Paquin, Dana Delany.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters peoples dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someones subconscious. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Batman and his new ally Wonder Woman recruit Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash to help them save the planet from a newly awakened enemy. Starring Ben Affleck, Henry Cavill, Gal Gadot.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Legendary hit man John Wick comes out of retirement when a former associate plots to seize control of an international assassins guild. Bound by a blood oath to help him, Wick travels to Rome to square off against the worlds deadliest killers. Starring Keanu Reeves, Common, Laurence Fishburne.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: To mark 20 years together, Jacob plans a surprise trip to Antwerp for Charlotte; when a third person joins, things take an erotic, dangerous turn; cul-de-sac outcast Alan dusts off his telescope.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Upon her return from Antwerp, Charlotte throws herself into her work; Gossip about the trip spreads throughout the hospital, leading to tension; Mia tries to do a good deed for Alan.

programme.title: Starbuck
programme.desc: More than 140 people sue a fertility clinic to reveal the name of the sperm donor (Patrick Huard) whose frequent contributions resulted in 533 offspring. Starring Patrick Huard, Julie Le Breton, Antoine Bertrand.

programme.title: Easy Land
programme.desc: A mentally ill Serbian architect tries to build a better future for her daughter in Canada. Starring Mirjana Jokovic, Nina Kiri, Daniel Kash.

programme.title: Below Her Mouth
programme.desc: An unexpected affair between two women develops into a passionate connection that changes their lives. Starring Natalie Krill, Erika Linder, Mayko Nguyen.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will begins to experience strange visions that are connected to the Cult of Kali; Magnus has difficulty with finding the solution to their problems.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team must find Kali in order to prevent tidal waves from killing millions; Will fights for his life in Mumbai.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: An Indiana lineman (Richard Dreyfuss) and other UFO-sighters, beleaguered by earlier incidents, finally have documented contact with space aliens. Starring Richard Dreyfuss, François Truffaut, Teri Garr.

programme.title: Looney Tunes: Back in Action
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny tries to find Daffy Duck after the Daffy loses his job and travels to Las Vegas with a man. Starring Brendan Fraser, Jenna Elfman, Steve Martin.

programme.title: Step Dogs
programme.desc: Meatball, a wise cracking country dog, and Cassie, Hollywoods most pampered pet, meet when their owners get married. The two fight constantly until burglars break into their house, and they must team up to protect their home. Starring Dylan Schmid, Brittney Wilson, Eliana Jones.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: Chaos reigns when two clueless fathers (Cuba Gooding Jr., Paul Rae) take charge of a dilapidated summer camp and its ill-behaved attendees. Starring Cuba Gooding, Lochlyn Munro, Paul Rae.

programme.title: The Master of Disguise
programme.desc: A genial waiter (Dana Carvey) tries to rescue his parents from a criminal mastermind by assuming various identities. Starring Dana Carvey, Jennifer Esposito, Harold Gould.

programme.title: Strange Brew
programme.desc: The Canadian McKenzie brothers (Dave Thomas, Rick Moranis) cork a beer-factory brewmeister (Max von Sydow) whos out to rule the world. Starring Dave Thomas, Rick Moranis, Max von Sydow.

programme.title: Bill and Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: The ruler of the future tells best friends Bill and Ted they must compose a new song to save life as we know it. But instead of writing it, they decide to travel through time to steal it from their older selves and bring harmony to the universe. Starring Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter, Kristen Schaal.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: An inept dog groomer (Jeff Daniels) and a limousine driver (Jim Carrey) chase the latters dream girl (Lauren Holly) cross-country. Starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two lazy, immature men become rivals when the marriage of ones mother and the others father forces them to live as siblings in the same house. Starring Will Ferrell, John C. Reilly, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Jacob comes to a heartbreaking realization, while Mias past finally catches up to her, leading to tumultuous events for everyone.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Relationships are imploding, and the fallout seems to have deadly consequences; Leo is in a race against time to try and uncover who is really behind the deaths at the hospital, while Alan is forced to take drastic actions to protect Mia.

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her sons disappearance. Starring Gary Oldman, Armie Hammer, Evangeline Lilly.

programme.title: Owning Mahowny
programme.desc: A casino manager preys on a compulsive gambler (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who had kept his obsession a secret from his girlfriend (Minnie Driver). Starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Minnie Driver, Maury Chaykin.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she cant figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will is having trouble recovering after his experience with Kali, but the team soon finds that insomnia is the least of his problems; Helen discovers an unbelievable gift from an equally unbelievable source.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team goes on a routine mission to retrieve an Abnormal and take it to safety; the mission becomes anything but routine when they are forced to stage a bank heist in order to protect the public from harm.

programme.title: Miracle on 34th Street
programme.desc: A retail-war lawyer (Dylan McDermott) goes to court to prove a department-store Santa Claus (Richard Attenborough) is for real. Starring Richard Attenborough, Elizabeth Perkins, Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a test pilot, may be the corps only hope when an enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power. Starring Ryan Reynolds, Blake Lively, Peter Sarsgaard.

programme.title: Charlies Angels
programme.desc: Three private detectives try to rescue a kidnapped computer pro whose voice-ID software would threaten global security. Starring Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore, Lucy Liu.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged newswoman (Meg Ryan) becomes obsessed with meeting a grieving widower (Tom Hanks) she heard on a late-night radio call-in show. Starring Tom Hanks, Meg Ryan, Bill Pullman.

programme.title: What a Girl Wants
programme.desc: A vivacious teenager (Amanda Bynes) leaves New York in order to meet her estranged father (Colin Firth) in London. Starring Amanda Bynes, Colin Firth, Kelly Preston.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: In 1953 a professor (Julia Roberts) of art history challenges her female students (Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles) to re-examine the traditional roles of women. Starring Julia Roberts, Kirsten Dunst, Julia Stiles.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Driven by an intense need for fame and validation, members of a dysfunctional Hollywood dynasty have lives as dramatic as any movie. Starring Julianne Moore, Mia Wasikowska, John Cusack.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter (Alison Lohman) probes the reasons behind the sudden split of a 1950s comedy team (Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth). Starring Kevin Bacon, Colin Firth, Alison Lohman.

programme.title: Reflections in a Golden Eye
programme.desc: An Army major (Marlon Brando) with a lusty wife (Elizabeth Taylor) feels homosexual in the 1940s South. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Marlon Brando, Brian Keith.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widows (Claudia Cardinale) land. Starring Henry Fonda, Claudia Cardinale, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Fitzcarraldo
programme.desc: An Irish dreamer (Klaus Kinski) hauls a huge riverboat overland in his quest for opera in the Amazon. Starring Klaus Kinski, Claudia Cardinale, Jose Lewgoy.

An Italian film director (Marcello Mastroianni) seeking the meaning of life retreats from his wife (Anouk Aimee), mistress and flatterers. Starring Marcello Mastroianni, Claudia Cardinale, Anouk Aimee.

programme.title: Dont Make Waves
programme.desc: A reckless beauty (Claudia Cardinale) runs a tourist (Tony Curtis) off the road, then brings him to her lovers Malibu beach house. Starring Tony Curtis, Claudia Cardinale, Sharon Tate.

programme.title: A Fine Pair
programme.desc: A New York police captain (Rock Hudson) helps an Italian beauty (Claudia Cardinale) return some stolen jewels to a safe in Austria. Starring Rock Hudson, Claudia Cardinale, Tomas Milian.

programme.title: West Point
programme.desc: Wealthy football player Brice Wayne enters West Point and, though he does well on the football field, angers his fellow cadets. He resigns, only to return for the big game and reunite with Betty Channing, the hotel owners daughter. Starring William Haines, Joan Crawford, William Bakewell.

programme.title: Secret Service of the Air
programme.desc: An undercover agent poses as a counterfeiter to infiltrate a gang responsible for smuggling illegal aliens into the U.S. Starring Ronald Reagan, John Litel, Ila Rhodes.

programme.title: Murder in the Air
programme.desc: T-man Brass Bancroft (Ronald Reagan) boards a Navy blimp to guard an "inertia projector" from a spy. Starring Ronald Reagan, Eddie Foy, James Stephenson.

programme.title: Secret Enemies
programme.desc: FBI agents (Craig Stevens, John Ridgely) raid a New York hotel, sending Nazi spies to an upstate hunting lodge. Starring Craig Stevens, Faye Emerson, John Ridgely.

programme.title: Born for Trouble
programme.desc: A reporter (Van Johnson) and his colleagues (Faye Emerson, George Meeker) work together to solve the murder of a death-row inmate. Starring Van Johnson, Faye Emerson, George Meeker.

programme.title: The Hidden Hand
programme.desc: The authorities apprehend an escaped mental patient turned serial killer. Starring Craig Stevens, Elizabeth Fraser, Julie Bishop.

programme.title: Private Detective
programme.desc: A female private eye joins forces with a police detective to investigate the suspicious murder of a millionaire. Starring Jane Wyman, Dick Foran, Gloria Dickson.

programme.title: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Brothers on opposite sides of the law clash over a stolen goods ring and their love for the same woman. Starring Richard Travis, Charles Lang, Eleanor Parker.

programme.title: Truck Busters
programme.desc: A driver leads independent truckers against big-time mob-supported operators who try to run them out of business. Starring Richard Travis, Virginia Christine, Charles Lang.

programme.title: Escape From Crime
programme.desc: An unemployed photojournalist finally gets his big break when he accidentally snaps a shot of a bank thief. Starring Richard Travis, Julie Bishop, Jackie Gleason.

programme.title: Dark Victory
programme.desc: An heiress (Bette Davis) with only months to live embarks on a social whirl, then marries her doctor (George Brent). Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Til We Meet Again
programme.desc: A dying woman (Merle Oberon) and condemned man (George Brent) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring Merle Oberon, George Brent, Pat OBrien.

programme.title: Honeymoon for Three
programme.desc: A novelist (George Brent) goes to Cleveland with his fiancee (Ann Sheridan) and meets an old flame tired of her husband (Charlie Ruggles). Starring Ann Sheridan, George Brent, Charlie Ruggles.

programme.title: Experiment Perilous
programme.desc: A doctor (George Brent) frees a young woman (Hedy Lamarr) from her devious philanthropist husband (Paul Lukas). Starring Hedy Lamarr, George Brent, Paul Lukas.

programme.title: You Cant Escape Forever
programme.desc: A demoted reporter (George Brent) and his girlfriend (Brenda Marshall) seek to expose a crime kingpin. Starring George Brent, Brenda Marshall, Gene Lockhart.

programme.title: Swingtime in the Movies
programme.desc: A director working on a musical falls for a local waitress working in a canteen. Starring Fritz Feld, Kathryn Kane, John Carroll.

programme.title: Montana Belle
programme.desc: Singing outlaw Belle Starr (Jane Russell) quits the Dalton gang and tricks a saloonkeeper (George Brent). Starring Jane Russell, George Brent, Scott Brady.

programme.title: The Gay Sisters
programme.desc: The eldest (Barbara Stanwyck) of three sisters protects their Fifth Avenue mansion from a developer (George Brent) she once married. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Geraldine Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Gold Is Where You Find It
programme.desc: A mining engineer (George Brent) falls for a wheat growers daughter (Olivia de Havilland) during a Sacramento Valley land war. Starring George Brent, Olivia de Havilland, Claude Rains.

programme.title: The Old Maid
programme.desc: Her suitors (George Brent) Civil War death forces an unwed mother (Bette Davis) to let her married cousin (Miriam Hopkins) raise her daughter. Starring Bette Davis, Miriam Hopkins, George Brent.

programme.title: Jezebel
programme.desc: A New Orleans belle (Bette Davis) uses another man (George Brent) to make her fiance (Henry Fonda) jealous. Starring Bette Davis, Henry Fonda, George Brent.

programme.title: The Great Lie
programme.desc: A lost aviators (George Brent) socialite wife (Bette Davis) makes a deal with a pianist (Mary Astor) having his baby. Starring Bette Davis, George Brent, Mary Astor.

programme.title: In This Our Life
programme.desc: A wretched woman (Bette Davis) runs off with her sisters (Olivia de Havilland) husband, for starters. Starring Bette Davis, Olivia de Havilland, George Brent.

programme.title: My Reputation
programme.desc: An Illinois widow (Barbara Stanwyck) with two young sons meets a major (George Brent) on leave who wants to have an affair. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, George Brent, Warner Anderson.

programme.title: Love Me or Leave Me
programme.desc: A 1920s Chicago mobster bullies singer Ruth Etting to Broadway and Hollywood. Starring Doris Day, James Cagney, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: Calamity Jane
programme.desc: Wild West sharpshooter Jane (Doris Day) falls for Wild Bill Hickok (Howard Keel) and tries to act more ladylike. Starring Doris Day, Howard Keel, Allyn Ann McLerie.

programme.title: My Dream Is Yours
programme.desc: A singers (Lee Bowman) ex-agent (Jack Carson) turns a wholesome girl (Doris Day) into a radio star. Starring Jack Carson, Doris Day, Lee Bowman.

programme.title: Please Dont Eat the Daisies
programme.desc: A New York drama critic (David Niven) moves his wife (Doris Day) and four boys to an old mansion in the country. Starring Doris Day, David Niven, Janis Paige.

programme.title: April in Paris
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat (Ray Bolger) escorts a chorus girl (Doris Day) mistakenly invited to Paris on behalf of American theater. Starring Doris Day, Ray Bolger, Claude Dauphin.

programme.title: Secret Enemies
programme.desc: FBI agents (Craig Stevens, John Ridgely) raid a New York hotel, sending Nazi spies to an upstate hunting lodge. Starring Craig Stevens, Faye Emerson, John Ridgely.

programme.title: Dont Talk
programme.desc: A federal agent tries to find an enemy informant. Starring Donald Douglas, Gloria Holden, Barry Nelson.

programme.title: Action in Arabia
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (George Sanders) and a French agent (Virginia Bruce) thwart a Nazi payoff to Arab sheiks in 1941 Damascus. Starring George Sanders, Virginia Bruce, Lenore Aubert.

programme.title: Background to Danger
programme.desc: A U.S. spy (George Raft) goes by train to Turkey and joins Russian agents against a Nazi spy (Sydney Greenstreet). Starring George Raft, Brenda Marshall, Sydney Greenstreet.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: A Dutch intelligence officer (Clark Gable) trains a shady woman (Lana Turner) for the underground, then thinks shes a Nazi spy. Starring Clark Gable, Lana Turner, Victor Mature.

programme.title: Above Suspicion
programme.desc: Honeymooners (Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray) spy for the British in 1939 Germany to learn more about the Nazis new magnetic mine. Starring Joan Crawford, Fred MacMurray, Conrad Veidt.

programme.desc: A French captain (Pierre Aumont) poses as a Nazi leader to pinpoint a U-boat base off the coast. Starring Jean-Pierre Aumont, Susan Peters, Richard Whorf.

programme.title: Sabotage Agent
programme.desc: A British spy (Robert Donat) helps the Czech underground blow up a Nazi poison-gas factory in Prague. Starring Robert Donat, Valerie Hobson, Walter Rilla.

programme.title: Hotel Berlin
programme.desc: An escapee (Helmut Dantine) from Dachau, an actress (Andrea King) and others hide in a grand hotel as the Third Reich falls. Starring Helmut Dantine, Andrea King, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugss home falls in the middle of an oil field that is owned by a stubborn business tycoon. This triggers a hilarious tug of war over the property rights to the space.

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: A cattleman (Rock Hudson) and his spoiled wife (Elizabeth Taylor) watch an upstart oilman (James Dean) try to take over Texas. Starring Elizabeth Taylor, Rock Hudson, James Dean.

programme.title: The Last Picture Show
programme.desc: The lives of high schoolers (Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges), a debutante (Cybill Shepherd) and others overlap in a dying 1950s Texas town. Starring Timothy Bottoms, Jeff Bridges, Cybill Shepherd.

programme.desc: A serial fraudster impersonates a member of nobility to con his victims out of thousands.

programme.desc: Steve, Cedric, Lovita and Regina (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn, Wendy Raquel Robinson) attend a seminar on faculty relationships.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - What You Wont Cue for Love
programme.desc: Steve and Cedric (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) take on Regina and Lovita (Wendy Raquel Robinson, Terri J. Vaughn) in a pool tournament.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Rent
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) falls for an IRS agent (guest star Vanessa Williams) who suspects that Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) is committing tax fraud.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Everybody Loves Regina

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Every Boy Needs a Teacher
programme.desc: A strange double date results after Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson) both find new romances with unlikely people.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Lovita Doesnt Live Here Anymore
programme.desc: Lovita (Terri J. Vaughn) walks out on her mother but doesnt find a big welcome from Cedric, Steve and Regina (Cedric The Entertainer, Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson).

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Snow Job
programme.desc: A snowstorm forces Steve and Lovita (Steve Harvey, Terri J. Vaughn) to spend time together; Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) getaway is canceled.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Uncle Steve
programme.desc: Steves (Steve Harvey) shy niece, Allison (guest star Megalyn Echikunwoke), is transformed by a make-over while visiting her uncle.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When Bryanna brings home a stray dog, the children hide it until Christmas Day, figuring Bernie will allow them to keep it.
